description:
This table presents metadata for ten Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) and High Resolution Layer (HRL) products within a data catalogue interface.

| Approved (EAGLE) | Name                           | Type          | Created At | Created By             | Country          | Region | Reference Year | Time Range                | Organisation/s           | Contact Person       | Status | INSPIRE Themes              |
|:-----------------|:-------------------------------|:--------------|:-----------|:-----------------------|:-----------------|:-------|:---------------|:--------------------------|:-------------------------|:---------------------|:-------|:----------------------------|
| ✔                | CLC+Backbone (2018)            | document icon | 05.09.2023 | CLC+ Core User Admin... | European Environ... | -      | 2018           | 01.07.2017 - 30.06.2019   | CLC, European Env...     | copernicus@eea.e...  | USED   | Land cover                  |
|                  | Coastal Zones (CZ) 2018        | document icon | 21.06.2023 | CLC+ Core User Admin... | European Environ... | -      | 2018           | 01.01.2017 - 31.12.2019   | CLC, European Env...     | info@eea.europa.eu   | USED   | Land use, Land cover        |
|                  | Corine Land Cover (CLC)...     | document icon | 06.09.2023 | CLC+ Core User Admin... | European Environ... | -      | 2018           | 01.01.2017 - 31.12.2018   | CLC, European Env...     | copernicus@eea.e...  | USED   | Land cover                  |
|                  | Effis 2018                     | document icon | 05.09.2023 | CLC+ Core User Admin... | European Environ... | -      | 2018           | 01.01.2018 - 31.12.2018   | CLC, European Env...     | [unreadable]         | USED   | Land use, Land cover        |
|                  | Eurocrop 2018                  | document icon | 05.09.2023 | CLC+ Core User Admin... | European Union (27) | -      | 2018           | 01.01.2018 - 31.12.2018   | CLC, European Env...     | [unreadable]         | USED   | Land cover                  |
|                  | HRL - Dominant Leaf Typ...     | document icon | 05.09.2023 | CLC+ Core User Admin... | European Environ... | -      | 2018           | 01.03.2018 - 31.10.2018   | CLC, European Env...     | copernicus@eea.e...  | USED   | Land use, Land cover        |
|                  | HRL - Forest Type (FTY)...     | document icon | 10.03.2023 | CLC+ Core User Admin... | European Environ... | -      | 2018           | 01.03.2018 - 31.10.2018   | CLC, European Env...     | copernicus@eea.e...  | USED   | Land cover                  |
|                  | HRL - Grassland 2018           | document icon | 05.09.2023 | CLC+ Core User Admin... | European Environ... | -      | 2018           | 01.03.2018 - 31.10.2018   | CLC, European Env...     | copernicus@eea.e...  | USED   | Land cover                  |
|                  | HRL - Impervious Densit...     | document icon | 09.03.2023 | CLC+ Core User Admin... | European Environ... | -      | 2018           | 01.01.2017 - 31.12.2019   | CLC, European Env...     | copernicus@eea.e...  | USED   | Land cover                  |
|                  | HRL - Tree Cover Density...    | document icon | 09.03.2023 | CLC+ Core User Admin... | European Environ... | -      | 2018           | 01.03.2018 - 31.10.2018   | CLC, European Env...     | copernicus@eea.e...  | USED   | Land cover                  |

The table displays 10 of 32 total items, with options to filter, add ingestions, or add extractions. Each product includes its name, type, creation date and creator (mostly "CLC+ Core User Admin"), country and region of coverage, a consistent Reference Year of 2018, specific Time Ranges, the responsible organization (mostly "CLC, European Environment Agency"), a contact person, a status of "USED", and its applicable Infrastructure for Spatial Information in the European Community (INSPIRE) Themes (either "Land cover" or "Land use, Land cover").
